memory.intro: Every agent gets its own long-lived memory: pinned preferences, recalled conversations and decisions, and hybrid keyword (BM25) + vector search. SQLite holds the real data; Qdrant is a rebuildable search index.
memory.qdrantDownPrefix: Not connected — semantic search is degraded and falling back to keyword search. Check the Qdrant container at
memory.enableDesc: When off, nothing is captured, indexed, or searched. Changes apply to new sessions and agents (a backend restart may be needed).
memory.modeDesc: economical: no planner or reranker · balanced: used only when needed · deep: a few bounded follow-up searches.
memory.autoCaptureDesc: Notice when you say things like “from now on…” or “remember that…” and propose a pin.
memory.approvalPolicyDesc: manual: every item waits for your approval · auto_low_risk: clear, low-risk items are saved automatically (anything sensitive always needs approval).
memory.rerankerDesc: The BGE reranker only runs on ambiguous queries, high-risk actions, or in deep mode.
memory.curatorApiKeySet: Already set — type a new key to replace it, or leave blank to keep it.
memory.curatorApiKeyUnset: Not set. Use this together with a cheaper router base URL.
memory.recallMinSimHint: Dense hits below this are dropped → an off-topic turn recalls nothing (0–1, default 0.44).
memory.graphMaxHopsHint: How far to traverse the relation graph. 1 = precise for the star graph; 2 risks noise (1–3, default 1).

memory.degraded: Semantic search is degraded (Qdrant unavailable) — falling back to keyword search.
